title: test_user_authentication_login
description: Verify that users can successfully log in using email/password and OTP verification methods at the /login and /otp-login endpoints.

title: test_user_authentication_signup
description: Verify that new users can successfully sign up using email/password and OTP verification at the /signup endpoint.

title: test_loan_application_submission
description: Verify that authenticated users can submit a multi-step loan application form successfully at the /apply endpoint.

title: test_user_dashboard_access
description: Verify that authenticated users can access their dashboard to view loan applications, payments, and account activity at the /dashboard endpoint.

title: test_loan_payment_processing
description: Verify that authenticated users can make loan payments using credit card or cryptocurrency at the /payment/:id and /pay-fee endpoints.

title: test_check_offers_access
description: Verify that users can access the pre-qualification tool to check available loan offers without authentication at the /check-offers endpoint.

title: test_admin_dashboard_access
description: Verify that authenticated admin users can access the administrative overview and analytics at the /admin endpoint.

title: test_admin_application_review
description: Verify that authenticated admin users can review, approve, and reject loan applications at the /admin/application/:id endpoint.

title: test_contact_form_submission
description: Verify that users can submit inquiries to customer support via the contact form at the /contact endpoint without authentication.
